activities_projects.title: Simple Circuit Construction
steps: Connect battery, bulb and switch using wires
Close the switch to light the bulb
Open the switch and observe the bulb
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands a basic circuit and role of components
activities_projects.evaluation: Bulb lights correctly when switch is closed (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Series Circuit Experiment
steps: Connect bulbs one after another with battery
Close the switch and observe brightness
Remove one bulb and observe effect on the other
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands series connection and its effect on current
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct series wiring and observations (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Parallel Circuit Experiment
steps: Connect bulbs parallel to each other with battery
Close the switch and note brightness
Remove one bulb and observe effect on the other
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands parallel connection and independent operation of bulbs
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct parallel wiring and observations (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Identifying Circuit Components
activities_projects.objective: Recognize symbols and components in a circuit
steps: Label battery, switch, bulb and wires in diagrams
Draw a simple circuit using symbols
Explain function of each component
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns circuit symbols and component functions

activities_projects.title: Measuring Current with Ammeter
steps: Connect ammeter in series with bulb and battery
Close switch and note reading
Open switch and observe change
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands measurement of current in a circuit
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct ammeter connection and reading (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Measuring Voltage with Voltmeter
activities_projects.objective: Learn to measure voltage across components
steps: Connect voltmeter across bulb terminals
Note voltage reading
Compare readings with different bulbs
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct voltmeter connection and reading (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Making a Switch
activities_projects.objective: Understand the function of a switch
steps: Insert paper clip in circuit as switch
Close and open clip to control bulb
Observe flow of current
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Learns role of switch in controlling circuits
activities_projects.evaluation: Switch works correctly to control bulb (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Series vs Parallel Observation
activities_projects.objective: Compare brightness in series and parallel circuits
steps: Connect bulbs in series and note brightness
Connect bulbs in parallel and note brightness
Compare observations
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands differences in current and brightness between series and parallel

activities_projects.title: Circuit Diagram Creation
steps: Draw a simple series circuit with switch and bulb
Draw a simple parallel circuit with two bulbs
Label all components correctly
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Develops skill of drawing and interpreting circuits
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct diagrams with proper symbols (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Quiz on Electricity Components
steps: Prepare five questions on series and parallel circuits
Prepare five questions on components and symbols
Exchange with a friend and solve
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Strengthens understanding of circuits and components
activities_projects.evaluation: Quality of questions and answers (10 marks)
